title: The Docket - Week 3 (Bonus Midweek)
subject: Wait — did Clio just become the Salesforce of legal?
preheader: The acquisition nobody predicted, plus a glossary update every lawyer needs
bodyHtml:
The Docket

LegalTech AI Hub · Special Edition — April 9, 2026

We don’t usually send midweek, but this week’s news warranted it. The legal tech landscape may have just consolidated in a way nobody saw coming.

💥 Clio Acquires Two AI Startups in One Week

Clio, the practice management giant, acquired both an AI document automation company and an AI-powered client intake platform in the span of five days. Combined with their existing AI features, Clio is positioning itself as the all-in-one platform for small and mid-size firms. The Salesforce comparison isn’t hyperbole — they’re building a legal practice ecosystem with AI at the center. For the thousands of firms already on Clio, this means AI features will arrive as updates, not new purchases. Read our updated Clio review.

📖 AI Glossary Terms Every Lawyer Should Know in 2026

We’ve updated our glossary with 25 new terms that have entered the legal AI conversation this year: RAG (retrieval-augmented generation), prompt injection, model fine-tuning, hallucination rate, and more. If you’re in meetings where these terms are used and you’re nodding along without full understanding, no judgment — but fix that today. See the full glossary.

🏛️ ABA Midyear Meeting: AI Dominated Every Panel

If you attended the ABA Midyear Meeting last week, you already know: AI was the topic of virtually every panel, CLE session, and hallway conversation. The most popular session? “AI and Ethics: What You Don’t Know Can Hurt Your License.” It was standing room only. The profession is waking up to the fact that AI competence is no longer optional.

From the Site

New Case Study: How a 15-Person Firm Cut Research Time by 60%

We published a new case study from a boutique employment law firm that implemented AI research tools across their entire practice. The result: 60% reduction in research time, higher associate satisfaction, and clients noticing faster turnaround. Real numbers, real firm, real workflow details.

Read the Case Study →

Back to our regular Wednesday schedule next week. Thanks for reading the special edition.
